lore.slime_time.slime_boots: An armour piece that allows the player to bounce around.
lore.slime_time.slime_bucket: A bucket with a Slime inside. Can be fed to Frogs to breed them.
lore.slime_time.magma_cube_bucket: A bucket with a Magma Cube inside. Can be fed to Frogs for Froglights.
lore.slime_time.slime_sling: Launches its user far off into the horizon.
effect.slime_time.slime_time.description: An effect that causes you to bounce around.
